data: {"generalSituation":"Tropical Cyclone Maysak will move into inland Guangxi today and weaken gradually. Under the influence of an active southerly airstream, the weather will remain unsettled over the coast of Guangdong today and tomorrow. A broad trough of low pressure and upper-air disturbances are expected to bring showers and thunderstorms to the coast of southern China midweek this week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Bavi over the western North Pacific will move towards the seas east of Taiwan in the latter part of this week. Its subsiding air will bring mainly fine and very hot weather to southern China.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260705","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers. Showers will be heavier in some areas with squally thunderstorms at first.
